mapper.select: select count(test_no) from tb_qc_test_mst where test_no = #{testNo} and req_date = #{reqDate}

select a.test_no ,a.req_date ,dbo.getUserName(a.req_tester_id) as req_tester_name ,a.req_tester_id ,dbo.getCommonName('item_type_cd', b.item_type_cd) as item_type_name ,b.item_type_cd ,b.item_cd ,C.item_name ,b.lot_no ,b.make_no ,a.req_qty ,dbo.getStorageName(a.storage_cd) as storage_name ,a.storage_cd ,a.tester_id ,dbo.getUserName(a.tester_id) as tester_name ,a.order_tester_id ,dbo.getUserName(a.order_tester_id) as order_tester_name ,a.confirm_tester_id ,dbo.getUserName(a.confirm_tester_id) as confirm_tester_name ,a.sample_tester_id ,dbo.getUserName(a.sample_tester_id) as sample_tester_name ,a.test_date ,a.confirm_date ,a.sample_qty ,a.test_qty ,a.test_state ,a.pass_state ,a.qc_test_id ,a.area_cd ,isnull((select max(seq)+1 from tb_qc_test_mst where retest_yn ='Y' and test_no = a.test_no ), 1) as seq ,a.retest_yn ,b.expiry_date ,b.customer_cd ,dbo.getCustomerName(b.customer_cd) as customer_Name ,d.order_type ,a.etc ,a.qc_cd from tb_qc_test_mst a inner join tb_item_test_no b on a.test_no = b.test_no inner join tb_pur_item c on a.test_no = c.test_no inner join tb_pur_mst d on c.pur_id = d.pur_id where a.qc_test_id = #{qcTestId}
SELECT test_item ,test_method ,test_spec ,test_result ,dist_order ,item_cd ,tester_name ,pass_state ,test_type_method_id FROM tb_test_type_method WHERE item_cd = #{itemCe} ORDER BY dist_order ASC
mapper.insert: insert into tb_qc_test_mst ( req_date, req_tester_id, area_cd, storage_cd, TEST_NO, seq, RETEST_YN, req_qty, TEST_STATE, PASS_STATE, reg_id, upd_id ) values (#{reqDate}, #{reqTesterId}, #{areaCd}, #{storageCd}, #{testNo}, #{seq}, 'Y', #{reqQty},'REQ', 'REQ', #{userId}, #{userId})
